```bash
$wf1 = Get-Content "d:\数字分身2\N8N\01-A对话清洗标注.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8

# 替换1: 8处 vaultPath
$wf1 = $wf1.Replace('D:\\\\数字分身2\\\\数字分身', 'D:\\\\数字分身2\\\\vault\\\\数字分身')

# 替换2: speDir 硬编码（JSON字符串中换行是\n）
$wf1 = $wf1.Replace("const speDir = path.join(vaultPath, '..', '.specstory', 'history');", "const speDir = 'D:\\\\.specstory\\\\history';")

# 替换3: scriptPath 硬编码
$wf1 = $wf1.Replace("const scriptPath = path.join(vaultPath, '..', 'N8N', 'scripts', 'specstory_clean.py');", "const scriptPath = 'D:\\\\N8N\\\\scripts\\\\specstory_clean.py';")

# 验证

$oldVaultGone = -not $wf1.Contains('D:\\\\数字分身2\\\\数字分身')
$speDirHard = $wf1.Contains("const speDir = 'D:\\\\.specstory\\\\history';")
$scriptHard = $wf1.Contains("const scriptPath = 'D:\\\\N8N\\\\scripts\\\\specstory_clean.py';")
$oldSpeGone = -not $wf1.Contains("path.join(vaultPath, '..', '.specstory'")
$oldScriptGone = -not $wf1.Contains("path.join(vaultPath, '..', 'N8N'")

Write-Host "新vaultPath出现次数: $vaultCount (期望8)"
Write-Host "旧vaultPath已清除: $oldVaultGone"

Write-Host "旧speDir已清除: $oldSpeGone"
Write-Host "旧scriptPath已清除: $oldScriptGone"

$wf1 | Set-Content "d:\数字分身2\N8N\01-A对话清洗标注.json" -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline
Write-Host "WF1写入完成"
```
